since_last: 65% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.32%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.29% · BTC +3.45% · Gold -0.39% · Nasdaq100 +0.53%. 65% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.32%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.32%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.15%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.15%, DELL +5.60%, VRT +4.23%, MU +4.14%, HPE +3.98%. Laggards: SPCX -8.07%, AVAV -7.82%, MDB -4.21%, GOOGL -3.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.07% at $170.07
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
